Changelogs

A clearer timeline of how WebBreak.ru became a physics breaking sandbox.

Update 1.2.0 Current

A major WebBreak.ru systems update: Community, saves, banners, achievements, admin tools, account settings, chaos effects, and mobile polish all landed together.

Added Community posts with Supabase support, likes, dislikes, comments, reports, featured builds, profile search, pinned comments, and post-owner moderation controls. Added My Library saves, build preview banners, resizable banner selection, Build Collections, copy-code tools, random community builds, and PC/Mobile creation badges. Added Achievements, achievement notifications with sound, profile levels, account cleanup settings, delete-account flow, visibility settings, and the Admin Panel for bans and reports. Upgraded Chaos tools with TNT physics, explosion particles and sounds, stronger black-hole absorption, slow motion toggle fixes, secret terminal behavior, and better built-in notifications. Reworked mobile UI, settings, theme selector, custom themes, iOS home-screen icon support, push notification prompts, terminal colors, badges, tips, and main-page typography. Improved object visuals and physics for glass, wool, swords, doors, banners, dragging, hitboxes, trash deletion, timer placement, and compact phone controls.
Release 1.1.0 Previous

WebBreak.ru got a cleaner identity, stronger physics, mobile fixes, a tougher captcha flow, and low-end performance work.

Renamed Minebuild to WebBreak.ru and refreshed the greeting, tips, and changelog copy around the new domain. Reworked spawned-object physics, Build Mode snapping, Edit Mode selection, throwing, rotation, and mobile controls. Redesigned captcha UI, restored multiple auth captcha variants, removed unused code, and added low-end PC optimizations.
Release 1.0.0 Previous

WebBreak.ru is now a full building playground with accounts, profile search, terminal tools, object editing, and stronger physics.

Added Start Building, draggable Terminal, Build Mode, Edit Mode, object selection, and quick edit buttons. Added Supabase profiles, Account IDs, search pages, likes, dislikes, descriptions, refresh, and admin tools. Rebuilt object physics on Matter.js, then kept mobile comfort, Midnight Theme, rotating tips, and register captcha.
First Build 0.0.1 Base

The first build started as a playful entry screen with a question flow, captcha card, theme switcher, and language toggle.
